steps.t: The city of Dale can be found north of Lake-town in the Dale-lands. You should travel to Dale.
You should find King Bard II, who can be found in the Great-keep in the north part of Dale.
You should talk to Erna, who can be found in the Great-keep in Dale.
The Easterling refugees can be found throughout Dale. You should speak with the Dorwinion and Chayasír Easterlings who have come within Dale's walls.
You should reassure the concerned Dale-folk that they are not in danger from the Easterling refugees.
Distressed Dorwinions can be found in Dale. You should comfort Dorwinions, still in shock from the devastation in the east and the difficulties of acc…
You should talk to Queen Regent Erna, who can be found within the Great-keep in Dale.
